<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\File\Exception; /** * Thrown when a file was not found. * * @author Bernhard Schussek <bschussek@gmail.com> */ class FileNotFoundException extends FileException { public function __construct(string $path) { parent::__construct(\sprintf('The file "%s" does not exist', $path)); } }
